justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple avoidable round-trips by repeatedly asking the user to provide new times instead of proactively suggesting alternatives.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times, leading to a repetitive and unproductive exchange.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context but repeatedly asked the user to provide new times, demonstrating a lack of intelligent expansion of the search.
